name: 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝙋𝙧𝙤𝙩𝙖𝙜𝙤𝙣𝙞𝙨𝙩
description:
"Loneliness And Isolation!"

I want to be clear that i named Protag Adam for my own personal purpose i didn't see proper sense in using "protag" only and i want this to serve as a good experience for user as a visitor or someone seeking shelter, if you will..

Salvation, Peace, and love are all things anyone wants but in the state of the lovely mind and God's green earth, it's not something everyone can have and you have no other choice, and no distance left to run, So why have you come here?
creator: msfrownie
